listeners.purpose: See hooks.json — same class registered as both listener + hook.
Cascade auto-cancel sessions on retired facility.
When a resource_booking is cancelled independently of the session, auto-cancel the session too. Fires SessionCancelled with trigger='booking_cancelled_externally'.

When a resource_booking is rescheduled (booking time changes), reflect the change on the linked session (starts_at/ends_at are derived — no update needed on session row, but fire SessionRescheduled for downstream consumers).
Null head_coach_id + remove from assistant arrays on future sessions.
When an athlete is deactivated (Wave 3+ athlete module), soft-delete their attendance rows on future sessions. Past sessions keep their attendance (safeguarding trail).
When a Team (Wave 2b) is disbanded, cancel all future sessions where team_id points at it. Past sessions retained.
When a season completes, scan for future sessions that reference the season and warn the admin. Does not auto-cancel (the tenant decides).
When tenant downgrades + loses session_private_lessons / session_coach_ratings / session_lesson_plans, flag the drift + surface in admin UI.
